reviews.comment:
De lo peor que vi. Los empleados exelentes pero no hay baños. No hay quiosco. No tiene gomeria. Y si te quedas a dormir te asesinan con el precio

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst places I've ever seen. The staff is excellent, but there are no restrooms. No kiosk. No tire shop. And if you stay overnight, they charge you an arm and a leg.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMTR1RmZREAE

reviews.comment:
Las recomendacion es que carguen suficiente combustible como para no tener que pasar a reponer combustible a garayalde..... una verdadera pérdida de tiempo para el viajero tienen poco personal y se generan colas de 40 minutos o una hora en época de vacaciones.

(Translated by Google)
The recommendation is to fill up with enough fuel so you don't have to stop to refuel in Garayalde... a real waste of time for the traveler, they have little staff and queues of 40 minutes or an hour are generated during the holiday season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdEp2SVZBEAE
